title: clickhouse server crashes when insert data to CoalescingMergeTree
description: ### Company or project name _No response_ ### Describe the unexpected behaviour When performing a simple INSERT statement into a table with String columns, ClickHouse crashes with a segmentation fault on macOS. This occurs even with very basic schemas (no special data types or functions). The crash consistently happens when inserting rows that include long strings — e.g., long names like "ALYAA HANNAN IZZAH BINTI MOHD JEFFREY TAN KAH JUN". ### Which ClickHouse versions are affected? ClickHouse local version 25.8.1.2533 (official build). ### How to reproduce DROP TABLE IF EXISTS client; CREATE TABLE client ( code String, name String, email String, contact_number String, last_reviewed_at DateTime64(3, 'UTC') ) ENGINE = CoalescingMergeTree() ORDER BY code; -- ✅ This works INSERT INTO client (code, name) VALUES ('A001', 'John Doe'); -- 💥 This crashes ClickHouse on macOS INSERT INTO client (name, code, email, contact_number, last_reviewed_at) VALUES ('ALYAA HANNAN IZZAH BINTI MOHD JEFFREY TAN KAH JUN', '12345', 'JEFFREY@YAHOO.COM', '017234444', now()); ### Expected behavior The insert should succeed or return an error message, not crash the ClickHouse server. ### Error message and/or stacktrace ### Additional context _No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE client (code TEXT, name TEXT, email TEXT, contact_number TEXT, last_reviewed_at DATETIME);
INSERT INTO client (code, name, email, contact_number, last_reviewed_at) VALUES ('A002', 'Jane Smith', 'JANE@EXAMPLE.COM', '0123456789', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO client (name, code, email, contact_number, last_reviewed_at) VALUES ('A' || repeat('B', 10000), 'A003', 'TEST@EXAMPLE.COM', '0198765432', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
key_bug_features: Inserting long strings into CoalescingMergeTree crashes server
